import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import splunklib.client as client
service = client.connect\(host='localhost', port=8089, username='admin', password='Qwer1234!', app='QueryTester', owner='nobody'\)
for ss in service.saved_searches:
    name = ss.name
    if 'QueryTester' in name or 'QT' in name:
        c = ss.content
        print\('Name:', name\)
        print\('  search:', c.get\('search', ''\)\)
        print\('  cron:', c.get\('cron_schedule', ''\)\)
        print\('  disabled:', c.get\('disabled', ''\)\)
        print\('  actions:', c.get\('actions', ''\)\)
        print\('  alert_type:', c.get\('alert_type', ''\)\)
        print\('  is_scheduled:', c.get\('is_scheduled', ''\)\)
        print\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:/Users/guyst/splunk-ui-toolkit-apps/packages/query-tester/stage/bin" && "/c/Program Files/Splunk/bin/python3.exe" << 'PYEOF'
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import splunklib.client as client

service = client.connect\(host='localhost', port=8089, username='admin', password='Qwer1234!', app='-', owner='-'\)

to_delete = []
for ss in service.saved_searches:
    if 'QueryTester' in ss.name or 'QT' in ss.name:
        to_delete.append\(ss\)
        
for ss in to_delete:
    print\('Deleting:', ss.name, '\(app=%s, owner=%s\)' % \(ss.access.get\('app'\), ss.access.get\('owner'\)\)\)
    try:
        ss.delete\(\)
        print\('  OK'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\('  Failed:', e\)

# Also delete the test sched search
try:
    service2 = client.connect\(host='localhost', port=8089, username='admin', password='Qwer1234!', app='QueryTester', owner='admin'\)
    service2.saved_searches.delete\('QT_TEST_SCHED'\)
    print\('Deleted QT_TEST_SCHED'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('QT_TEST_SCHED:', e\)
PYEOF)

import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import splunklib.client as client

service = client.connect\(host='localhost', port=8089, username='admin', password='Qwer1234!'\)

# Check if scripted inputs are available
try:
    resp = service.get\('data/inputs/script'\)
    print\('Scripted inputs endpoint OK'\)
    body = resp.body.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
    if 'scheduled_runner' in body:
        print\('scheduled_runner already registered'\)
    else:
        print\('scheduled_runner not yet registered \(need Splunk restart\)'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', e\)
PYEOF)

import sys, os, json
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import splunklib.client as client

service = client.connect\(host='localhost', port=8089, username='admin', password='Qwer1234!', app='-', owner='-'\)

print\("=== Saved searches after cleanup ==="\)
for ss in service.saved_searches:
    if 'QT' in ss.name or 'QueryTester' in ss.name:
        print\("  ", ss.name, "\(app=%s, owner=%s\)" % \(ss.access.get\('app'\), ss.access.get\('owner'\)\)\)
        print\("    cron:", ss.content.get\('cron_schedule'\)\)
        print\("    disabled:", ss.content.get\('disabled'\)\)

if not any\('QT' in ss.name or 'QueryTester' in ss.name for ss in service.saved_searches\):
    print\("  \(none\)"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "C:/Users/guyst/splunk-ui-toolkit-apps/packages/query-tester/stage/bin" && "/c/Program Files/Splunk/bin/python3.exe" << 'PYEOF'
import sys, os, json
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import splunklib.client as client

service = client.connect\(host='localhost', port=8089, username='admin', password='Qwer1234!', app='QueryTester'\)

# The testId for aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa is 503b5cd9-6535-4fa5-bf8b-847a4ddd3586
resp = service.get\('storage/collections/data/saved_tests/503b5cd9-6535-4fa5-bf8b-847a4ddd3586', output_mode='json'\)
data = json.loads\(resp.body.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)
print\("name:", data.get\("name"\)\)
print\("app:", data.get\("app"\)\)
defn = data.get\("definition", ""\)
if isinstance\(defn, str\):
    defn = json.loads\(defn\)
print\("definition keys:", list\(defn.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(defn, dict\) else type\(defn\)\)
if isinstance\(defn, dict\):
    print\("  testName:", defn.get\("testName"\)\)
    print\("  testType:", defn.get\("testType"\)\)
    print\("  app:", defn.get\("app"\)\)
    q = defn.get\("query", {}\)
    if isinstance\(q, dict\):
        print\("  query.spl:", q.get\("spl", ""\)[:80]\)
    else:
        print\("  query:", str\(q\)[:80]\)
    print\("  scenarios:", len\(defn.get\("scenarios", []\)\)\)
PYEOF)
